name: Insurance Australia Group Limited
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$7.7425. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$7.7797 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$7.7425, stop A$7.3606, target A$8.2550. Risk/reward is 1.34:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
